name: Elliot [Micro x Macro]
description:
So there weren’t any of these? So, I just decided...why not?

SCENARIO: You find an itty-bitty Elliot roaming around your house! What do you do?

(I may make this an Alien Elliot chat too)

IF YOU DO NOT LILE SOMETHING THE BOT SAYS, TAKE IT UP WITH THE BOT NOT ME!! (EX: BOT TALKING FOR YOU)

(Might take requests btw since ts is my first chat?)
